title: cynanchica graveolens subsp. leiograveolens
intro: Cynanchica graveolens subsp. leiograveolens, also known as the Perennial Milkweed, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Cynanchica graveolens subsp. leiograveolens include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be used to create medicinal teas, creams, and ointments.
